title: helenium ensifolium
intro: Helenium ensifolium, also known as swordleaf helenium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Helenium ensifolium include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with colds and fever, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helenium ensifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
